text.title: django-decision-tree Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for the artifact produced by applying django-decision-tree.

example.code: {"layer_chosen":"services","placement_rationale":"Writes the Order row and calls Stripe; both are side effects, so it belongs in services.","is_pure":false,"has_side_effects":true,"crosses_http_boundary":false}

example.note: Invalid: side-effectful code placed in utils; rationale too short.

list.item: layer_chosen is one of the allowed enum values.
Pure code → utils; side effects → services or tasks; HTTP → views.
